About International City;
Dubai International city is a country-themed architecture of residences, business, and tourist attractions. Spreading over an area of 800 hectares (8 million square meters), the arrangement of the city is inspired by the traditional carpets of Middle East. Once completed, the project will contain studio and one bedroom apartments and accommodate over 60,000 residents.

It is composed of 485 buildings embraces the residential districts of Central Business District (CBD), and 10 Clusters: Persia, Greece, Spain, Morocco, England, France, Italy, Russia, China and Emirates. Apart from these districts that were initially planned for Dubai International City namely Lake District and Forbidden City are now on put on hold due to the effects of the Global Financial Recession. Attractions in the city include the Dragon Mart, which is the world's biggest machinery and equipment market.

property.title_en: Family-friendly community | Luxurious Living

property.name: Mira Villas
property.description_en:
Springfield Properties is pleased to bring Mira Villas by Bentley Home in the market. Mira Villas introduces a premium collection of luxury villas in the dynamic locale of Meydan. This exceptional residential offering is the result of a collaboration with Luxury Living Group and Bentley Home, renowned names in the world of luxury design and craftsmanship.

Kitchen and appliances
The villas are fully equipped & ready to move in: dishes by Bernardaud, glassware by Baccarat, cutlery by Christofle, home lighting by Lalique, bed line by Frette, kitchens by Gaggenau

Furnishing
Fully furnished with Hand-crafted Bentley Home furniture. All villas come with 3 years free maintenance warranty, including coverage for the furniture. 

Project Details:
- B + G + 1F + Roof Configuration
- 50/50 Payment Plan
- Four bedrooms on the first floor
- Guest room on the ground floor
- Rooftop Terraces
- Smart Home Technology
- Private Gym and Cinema for Mansions
- Private Pool for Mansions

Project Features and Amenities:
- Waterfront location with private lagoon
- Gymnasion by Technogym
- Clubhouse with F&B Services

Finishing and materials
The villas will come in one of three interior design themes - traditional, formal or contemporary with high-quality materials.

Payment Plan:
20% on Booking
30% During Construction
50% Upon Handover in 2026

Meydan is a prestigious Dubai community renowned for its blend of luxury, entertainment, and urban convenience. Home to the iconic Meydan Racecourse, it offers residents a unique blend of high-end living and world-class sporting events. With its expansive parks, landscaped gardens, and strategic location, Meydan provides an exceptional quality of life.

property.description_en:
Spring Field Properties offers you a unit for rent in Boulevard  Walk, Downtown. 

**Modern 2-Bedroom Apartment with Stunning Views – Available Now!**

Welcome to your new home in the heart of luxury living! This exquisite 2-bedroom apartment is a blend of comfort and sophistication, offering a spacious 1389 sqft layout that's perfect for modern living.

**Key Features:**

- **Fully Equipped Kitchen**: Enjoy cooking in a sleek, semi-open/closed kitchen designed with the latest appliances and ample storage space. 

- **Upgraded Wooden Flooring**: Revel in the elegance of anti-moisture wooden floors, providing both durability and style.

- **Expansive Balcony**: Unwind on your large balcony, offering a serene view that's perfect for relaxation and entertaining.

- **Move-In Ready**: The apartment is vacant and meticulously maintained, ready for you to make it your own.

- **Chiller Free**: Experience additional savings with complimentary cooling, a standout feature in this premium residence.

- **Affordable Luxury**: Priced at AED 170,000 in 3 cheques, with a 5% security deposit and 5% agency fees, this home offers exceptional value.

Don’t miss out on this opportunity to elevate your lifestyle. Contact us today to schedule a viewing and step into your new home!

property.description_en:
The Nineteen Riviera Lagoon is located at the heart of District 11, one of Mohammed Bin Rashed City’s most popular and well-established neighbourhoods. Situated on the Shore of a serene central lagoon, Nineteen Riviera Lagoon consists of an elegant grouping of detached villas.

Property Details::
- 50/50 Flexible Payment Plan
- Handover on 2026
- BUA from 15,500 sq. ft. to 22,200 sq. ft. 
- Plot size from 8,500n sq. ft. to 13,800 sq. ft.

Highlights and Amenities:
- Choose between 5 to 7 bedrooms
- Basement Parking up to 14 Cars
- Private Elevator
- Indoor Green Spaces
- Maid's and Nanny's Room
- Chef's and Driver's Room
- Double Height Entrance
- 4-meter High Ceiling on Ground Floor
- Italian Show and Main Kitchen
- Miela Appliances
- Spacious Swimming Pool with Sunken Seating
- 2 Master Bedrooms with Walk-in Closet
- 2nd Floor Lounge with Outdoor Terrace
- 2nd Floor Terrace Plunge Pool
- 3 Different Interior Options

Finishing and materials
Modern finishing with high-quality materials. Residents can choose from 3 types of finishes - Grey Riviera Finishings; Beige Riviera Finishings & Versace Inspired Finishings.
Kitchen and appliances

Fully equipped Italian kitchen with Miele appliances and convenient Quooker tap. 

Nad Al Sheba is a prestigious district in Dubai known for its luxurious residential properties, modern amenities, and strategic location. The area is primarily composed of spacious villas, providing residents with privacy, comfort, and a high standard of living.

The area is well-equipped with recreational and educational facilities, enhancing its appeal to both residents and investors. The Nad Al Sheba Sports Complex offers a variety of sports activities, including tennis, football, and swimming, while the Meydan Racecourse, home to the annual Dubai World Cup, adds a touch of elegance and excitement to the community. Top-tier schools such as North London Collegiate School and Kings' School ensure that educational needs are met, making it a preferred location for families with children.

**We have multiple units available for rent & sale in various communities in Dubai.
For inquiries and viewing requests,
You may call Rossana Lacad or email info@springfield-re.com for more information.

Fully equipped Italian kitchen with Miele appliances and convenient Quooker tap. 

Nad Al Sheba is a prestigious district in Dubai renowned for its luxurious villas and upscale living. The area features modern amenities and recreational facilities, including the Nad Al Sheba Sports Complex, which offers tennis, football, and swimming, and the Meydan Racecourse, famous for hosting the Dubai World Cup. property.description_en:
Springfield Properties is pleased to bring Mira Villas by Bentley Home in the market. Mira Villas introduces a premium collection of luxury villas in the dynamic locale of Meydan. This exceptional residential offering is the result of a collaboration with Luxury Living Group and Bentley Home, renowned names in the world of luxury design and craftsmanship.

Kitchen and appliances
The villas are fully equipped & ready to move in: dishes by Bernardaud, glassware by Baccarat, cutlery by Christofle, home lighting by Lalique, bed line by Frette, kitchens by Gaggenau

Furnishing
Fully furnished with Hand-crafted Bentley Home furniture. All villas come with 3 years free maintenance warranty, including coverage for the furniture. 

Project Details:
- B + G + 1F + Roof Configuration
- 50/50 Payment Plan
- Four bedrooms on the first floor
- Guest room on the ground floor
- Rooftop Terraces
- Smart Home Technology
- Private Gym and Cinema for Mansions
- Private Pool for Mansions

Project Features and Amenities:
- Waterfront location with private lagoon
- Gymnasion by Technogym
- Clubhouse with F&B Services

Finishing and materials
The villas will come in one of three interior design themes - traditional, formal or contemporary with high-quality materials.

Payment Plan details:
20% on Booking
30% During Construction
50% Upon Handover in 2026

Meydan is a prestigious Dubai community renowned for its blend of luxury, entertainment, and urban convenience. Home to the iconic Meydan Racecourse, it offers residents a unique blend of high-end living and world-class sporting events. With its expansive parks, landscaped gardens, and strategic location, Meydan provides an exceptional quality of life.

About the community:
Dubai Islands offers an exceptional blend of island living and vacation-style amenities. Featuring luxury resorts, vibrant village centers, elite wellness and sports venues, pristine beaches for water sports, and lush green spaces, this destination is a true paradise. Located north of the city, it encompasses five stunning islands with over 50 kilometers of waterfront homes and hotels, all connected to the mainland by the striking Infinity Bridge.

NOC FEE 525

About the community: 
Dubai International city is a country-themed architecture of residences, business, and tourist attractions. Spreading over an area of 800 hectares (8 million square meters), the arrangement of the city is inspired by the traditional carpets of Middle East. Once completed, the project will contain studio and one bedroom apartments and accommodate over 60,000 residents.
It is composed of 485 buildings embraces the residential districts of Central Business District (CBD), and 10 Clusters: Persia, Greece, Spain, Morocco, England, France, Italy, Russia, China and Emirates. Apart from these districts that were initially planned for Dubai International City namely Lake District and Forbidden City are now on put on hold due to the effects of the Global Financial Recession. Attractions in the city include the Dragon Mart, which is the world's biggest machinery and equipment market.

Springfield Properties offers well-thought-out unit for sale in Downtown Views in Downtown Dubai. 

"Experience the Magic: Indulge in the Heart of Downtown Dubai!"

Property Details:
- 1 Spacious Bedroom.
- 2 Sleek Bathroom.
- Size: sqft.
- Fully Furnished.
- Premium Furnishings.
- High Floor.
- Built-in Wardrobes.
- 1 Covered Parking.
- Kitchen and appliances included.

AMENITIES:
- Infinity Pool w/ Jacuzzi.
- State-of-the-Art Gym.
- Outdoor Gym.
- Yoga Lawn.
- Multi-sport courts.
- Multi-Purpose Community Room.

About the community:
Downtown Dubai is a prestigious district at the city's heart, renowned for its iconic landmarks, including the world’s tallest skyscraper and the second largest shopping mall. It attracts year-round tourist traffic and is well-connected to Business Bay and other key areas via Sheikh Zayed Road, making it easy for residents to navigate the city.

**We have multiple units available for rent & sale in various communities in Dubai.

For inquiries and viewing requests,
You may call Babar Mushtaq or email info@springfield-re.com for more information.

About the community: 
DAMAC Hills is a fully developed, self-sufficient community featuring villas, apartments, and a hotel residence. It includes the Trump International Golf Club Dubai and nearly four million square feet of parkland with diverse themed areas for relaxation and sports. Residents can enjoy serene gardens and lakes, a skate park, stables, a football field, tennis courts, and much more.

About the community: 
Jumeirah Village Circle (JVC) is a mixed-use community in new Dubai, offering easy highway access and a variety of residential and commercial properties. It features villas, townhouses, apartments, and commercial spaces, complemented by green parks, sports facilities, fitness centers, and playgrounds. JVC also boasts retail and dining options, and is close to attractions like the Dubai Miracle Garden, Dubai Sports City, and the Emirates Golf Club.
